package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for migration_tests_live_under_handler_packages: Migration-specific tests located in transport packages.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule096NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule096NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule096NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario096Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule096NegativeService, input Rule096NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
